fact.it: JavaScript è stato progettato da Brendan Eich in soli 10 giorni, nel maggio 1995, mentre lavorava a Netscape.
fact.en: JavaScript was designed by Brendan Eich in just 10 days, in May 1995, while he was at Netscape.

lastWin.repoDesc: A playable Slot Machine for GitHub Profiles powered by Python, GitHub Actions, and animated SVGs.
